NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of October 15, 2023, by and between Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC S2345678G, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore, and Stellar Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN 200123456N, located at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore. Contact: +65 6123 4567, email: contact@stellarinnovations.sg.

1. Confidential Information. For purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any data or information disclosed by either party to the other, whether in writing, orally, or by any other means, that is designated as confidential or that should reasonably be understood to be confidential. The parties agree that the disclosure of Confidential Information does not constitute a representation or warranty regarding project status or project plan outcomes.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party. The receiving party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information and to use it solely for the purposes of evaluating a potential business relationship between the parties, as contemplated by this Agreement. The receiving party shall not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without the prior written consent of the disclosing party. This clause shall survive the termination of this Agreement. Any breach of this obligation may result in financial liabilities not exceeding SGD 50,000.

For verification purposes, the receiving party may access their user account at https://example.sg/user/S3456789H. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings, written or oral, relating to such subject matter.
